CVE-2019-11556.title: Pagure before 5.6 allows XSS via the templates/blame.html blame v ...
CVE-2019-11556.summary: Pagure before 5.6 allows XSS via the templates/blame.html blame view.

CVE-2024-47515.title: A vulnerability was found in Pagure. Support of symbolic links du ...
CVE-2024-47515.summary: A vulnerability was found in Pagure. Support of symbolic links during repository archiving of repositories allows the disclosure of local files. This flaw allows a malicious user to take advantage of the Pagure instance.

CVE-2024-47516.title: A vulnerability was found in Pagure. An argument injection in Git ...
CVE-2024-47516.summary: A vulnerability was found in Pagure. An argument injection in Git during retrieval of the repository history leads to remote code execution on the Pagure instance.

CVE-2024-4981.title: A vulnerability was discovered in Pagure server. If a malicious u ...
CVE-2024-4981.summary: A vulnerability was discovered in Pagure server. If a malicious user were to submit a git repository with symbolic links, the server could unintentionally show incorporate and make visible content from outside the git repo.

CVE-2024-4982.title: A directory traversal vulnerability was discovered in Pagure serv ...
CVE-2024-4982.summary: A directory traversal vulnerability was discovered in Pagure server. If a malicious user submits a specially cratfted git repository they could discover secrets on the server.
